raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box (on table, centered between both arms)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box is reachable from both sides; there is sufficient lateral clearance between the box and any table edges/other objects to allow both end-effectors to make opposing side contact. The robot can apply balanced inward force to prevent slip since the box (30x30x30 cm) exceeds the 10 cm claw-grasp limit.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held in a two-sided pinch by both end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, with stable control maintained by symmetric dual-arm support."
  }
]

parsed_json.Target: darker box (on table, centered between both arms)
parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box is reachable from both sides; there is sufficient lateral clearance between the box and any table edges/other objects to allow both end-effectors to make opposing side contact. The robot can apply balanced inward force to prevent slip since the box (30x30x30 cm) exceeds the 10 cm claw-grasp limit.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held in a two-sided pinch by both end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, with stable control maintained by symmetric dual-arm support.
